item.title: ObserverUK: Rory Smith reposteó The Observer @ObserverUK · 1h Hope or heartbreak? Arsenal know they must slay the ghosts of failures
item.description:
Rory Smith reposteó The Observer @ObserverUK · 1h Hope or heartbreak? Arsenal know they must slay the ghosts of failures past, writes @RorySmith
Mikel Arteta’s team go to the Etihad again with more than the title on the line, and racked by fear of City overhauling them once more De observer.co.uk 1 350

item.title: Tony_Scott11: Patrick Boyland reposteó Tony Scott @Tony_Scott11 · 8min Evertonians await the Everton coach on Regent Road 1 9 59 739

item.title: indykaila: indykaila News @indykaila · 4min Martin Ødegaard was at the @Arsenal hotel eating eggs this morning 57 10 74 4 mil

item.title: kierangill_DM: Kieran Gill @kierangill_DM · 4min Footage of this below is floating around on social media. Should also note Cucurella d
item.description: Kieran Gill @kierangill_DM · 4min Footage of this below is floating around on social media. Should also note Cucurella did some applauding towards fans before heading for the tunnel and being stopped by Isa Cita Kieran Gill @kierangill_DM · 11h Didn’t mention it in my write-up, but Marc Cucurella tried dashing down the tunnel after full-time, only to be told to turn around by Willie Isa. Two years remaining on Cucurella’s contract this summer. Could end up one of those sold unless Chelsea convince him to extend x.com/kierangill_dm/… 1 8 705
